item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin
item.content:encoded:
At Digiveritaz, we prioritize your privacy and are dedicated to safeguarding your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you visit and interact with our website. By accessing or using our website, you agree to the terms outlined in this policy. If you disagree with any part of this policy, please refrain from using our site.

1. Consent and Use of Information

By utilizing our website and submitting your details, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described here. Your data will be used exclusively to provide the services you request and fulfill our business obligations.

2. Information We Collect

When you engage with Digiveritaz, we collect personal details you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, and payment details if applicable. Additionally, we employ cookies and other tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, improve website security, and deliver personalized content.

3. Data Ownership and Handling

Your personal data remains your property. Digiveritaz acts as a responsible custodian, handling your information solely for the purpose of delivering agreed-upon services. We do not use your data for unrelated purposes and share it only with trusted partners when necessary for service delivery or security measures.

4. Purpose of Data Collection

The information you provide helps us:

  • Deliver requested products or services efficiently
  • Tailor your online experience according to your preferences
  • Facilitate communication about updates or changes to our services
  • Investigate and prevent fraudulent or unauthorized activities

5. Data Retention

We retain your personal information only as long as required to complete the services you’ve requested or to comply with legal obligations. Once no longer needed, your data is securely deleted or anonymized to protect your privacy.

6. Your Rights Regarding Your Data

You have full control over your personal information. You may request access, updates, corrections, or deletion of your data at any time by contacting us. Additionally, you can limit or object to certain processing activities in accordance with applicable laws.

7. Sharing Your Information

Digiveritaz shares personal data only when:

  • Necessary to fulfill your service requests or ensure security
  • Required by law or legal processes
  • With authorized affiliates and partners who maintain strict confidentiality and data protection standards
  • During corporate changes like mergers or acquisitions, with assurances that your data remains protected

8. Security Measures

We employ industry-standard security practices, including encryption, controlled access, and secure communication channels, to protect your data from unauthorized access. However, no online system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute protection against breaches.

9. External Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. These external sites have independent privacy policies, and Digiveritaz is not responsible for their data practices. We recommend reviewing their privacy notices before sharing any personal information.

10. Marketing Communications and Opt-Out

You may choose to opt out of receiving promotional emails or marketing communications from us at any time by following the unsubscribe instructions provided in those messages or by contacting us directly.

11. Contact for Privacy Concerns

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please contact our Privacy Officer:

  • Name: Mihir Lunia
  • Address: 1st Floor, Office No. 06, Raghuvanshi Mansion, Raghuvanshi Mill Compound, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai – 400013
  • Phone: +91 9930070767
  • Email: mihir@digiveritaz.com

12. Policy Updates

We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally to reflect changes in laws or our practices. We encourage you to review this page regularly. Significant changes will be notified via website announcements or email.

By continuing to use our website, you acknowledge acceptance of the terms of this Privacy Policy as updated.

Thank you for trusting Digiveritaz with your information.

item.title: Terms And Conditions
item.dc:creator: digverisuperadmin
item.content:encoded:
These Terms and Conditions ("Agreement") form a binding contract between you (the "Client" or "User") and Digiveritaz ("Service Provider" or "Contractor"). Please read these terms carefully before using our services. By registering, creating an account, or proceeding with any transactions, you agree to adhere to and be bound by this Agreement.

A. Introduction

This Agreement governs your use of Digiveritaz’s services (“Services”), which include access to our digital platforms, business solutions, and any related tools or consulting offerings. This Agreement will remain effective until terminated as per the conditions outlined in Section F.

B. Payments, Billing, and Taxes

1. Payment Methods and Authorization

Users agree to set up an authorized electronic payment method, such as an automated clearing mandate or other accepted online payment system, to facilitate recurring billing on a prearranged date. This ensures uninterrupted access and smooth payment processing.

2. Billing Schedule and Late Fees

Subscription charges are billed monthly based on the date your subscription begins, with no grace period for late payments. Overdue payments will incur an interest charge at the rate of 18% per annum, and services may be suspended until all dues are cleared. Billing continues during any suspension period.

3. Tax Compliance

The User is responsible for adhering to all applicable tax regulations, including any required filings such as TDS. Any penalties or liabilities resulting from non-compliance will be indemnified by the User.

C. Subscription and Renewal

Renewal Process and Pricing This Agreement does not automatically renew. One month prior to contract expiration, both parties will review terms, including pricing adjustments. If an agreement is not reached, the subscription will end at the contract’s conclusion.

D. User Account Responsibilities

Clients are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials. Digiveritaz is not liable for any unauthorized access or activities arising from negligence on the User’s part. Users must comply with all relevant laws while using the service.

E. Confidentiality and Data Protection

1. Confidentiality Assurance

All data and materials shared or processed via Digiveritaz’s services remain the Client’s property. The Service Provider will only use such information as necessary to fulfill the contracted services and will keep it confidential except when disclosure is legally required.

2. Use of Anonymized Data

Digiveritaz may use aggregated or anonymized information to improve service quality. No personally identifiable or business-specific information will be shared or reused beyond the scope of this Agreement without explicit consent.

F. Termination

1. Ending the Service

Clients may terminate services through the platform at any time, subject to a final billing cycle as notice. All pending payments must be settled before account closure or service discontinuation.

2. Lock-In and Early Termination Fees

A minimum lock-in period of 4 months applies. Termination within this period will incur an early termination fee equal to the remaining subscription fees for the lock-in duration.

G. Liability and Indemnification

Clients agree to indemnify Digiveritaz from any losses, penalties, or damages arising from tax violations, misuse of services, or breaches of this Agreement. Digiveritaz’s liability is limited to the maximum extent allowed by law and excludes indirect or consequential damages.

H. Intellectual Property

All intellectual property rights associated with Digiveritaz’s services, including software, trademarks, and logos, remain with Digiveritaz. Clients are granted a non-transferable, non-exclusive license during their subscription period. Unauthorized use, duplication, or distribution is prohibited.

I. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of India. Any disputes arising will be resolved exclusively in courts with jurisdiction over this Agreement.

J. Non-Solicitation Clause

During the contract term and for two years after termination, the Client agrees not to solicit or employ any Digiveritaz employees without prior written consent. Violations require compensation equal to the affected employee’s annual salary.

Information We Collect

When you engage with Digiveritaz, we collect personal details you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, and payment details if applicable. Additionally, we employ cookies and other tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, improve website security, and deliver personalized content.

K. Marketing and Publicity

Digiveritaz reserves the right to showcase the Client’s name and logo for promotional purposes unless expressly instructed otherwise in writing.

L. Grievance Officer

For any concerns or disputes, please contact our Grievance Officer:
  • Name: Mihir Lunia
  • Address: 1st Floor, Office No. 06, Raghuvanshi Mansion, Raghuvanshi Mill Compound, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai – 400013
  • Phone: +91 9930070767
  • Email: mihir@digiveritaz.com

M. Entire Agreement and Amendments

This Agreement represents the entire understanding between parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and signed by both parties.

Simply reach out through our Contact Us page. We’ll set up a discovery call to understand your goals, share relevant case studies, and outline a custom strategy for your brand. From there, onboarding is quick, transparent, and driven by your timeline.

What makes DigiVeritaz different from other digital marketing agencies?

We don’t chase vanity metrics we commit to real business outcomes. With over 15+ years of experience and the agility of a startup, we offer guaranteed performance marketing backed by AI tools, automation, and a full-funnel growth strategy. Every rupee is spent with purpose, precision, and accountability.
Do you guarantee results? How can performance marketing be guaranteed?

Yes, we operate on a performance-first model. We align our campaigns with your KPIs such as leads, or conversions, not just clicks or impressions. Through AI-driven targeting, proprietary attribution models, and continuous optimization, we ensure measurable value at every touchpoint.
What kind of businesses do you typically work with?

We work with startups, SMEs, and enterprise brands across sectors like e-commerce, entertainment, SaaS, healthcare, and more. Whether you’re looking to scale a new product or optimize an existing funnel, our solutions are tailored to fit your growth stage and business objectives.
How do your AI tools and automation solutions work?

Our tech stack includes proprietary automation tools for campaign management, lead scoring, and predictive analytics. We also integrate industry-leading platforms like AIsensy, SE Ranking, Zapier, and more to create intelligent marketing workflows that scale performance with minimal manual effort.
Do you offer branding and design services or just paid ads?

Absolutely, we’re a full-service agency. From brand identity and design systems to social media content and UX design, our creative team builds cohesive, high-impact brand experiences that complement your paid campaigns and drive engagement.
Can you handle both lead generation and e-commerce marketing?

Yes. Our full-funnel strategies cater to both lead-gen and D2C/e-commerce businesses. We optimize every stage from ad click to checkout or sign-up using personalized creatives, retargeting flows, CRO strategies, and automated nurture sequences.
How do you measure success and ROI?

We use real-time dashboards and custom attribution models to track the entire customer journey. From ad spend to sale, we report on true impact metrics like cost-per-acquisition (CPA), return on ad spend (ROAS), and customer lifetime value (LTV). Transparency is our baseline.
How involved do I need to be as a client?

We’re as collaborative as you’d like us to be. Whether you prefer weekly strategy calls or a hands-off dashboard view, we adapt to your workflow. Our onboarding process ensures we align on KPIs, brand voice, and business goals from day one.
Do you offer ongoing support or only project-based services?

We offer both. Whether you need an end-to-end marketing partner on retainer or support for a single launch/project, our solutions are flexible. Most of our clients choose long-term partnerships because of our impact and consistency.
How do we get started with DigiVeritaz?

Simply reach out through our Contact Us page. We’ll set up a discovery call to understand your goals, share relevant case studies, and outline a custom strategy for your brand. From there, onboarding is quick, transparent, and driven by your timeline.
FAQs Digital Marketing & Performance – Digiveritaz
Find answers to common questions about Digiveritaz’s digital marketing, SEO and performance services.

Phase 1: Launch

• Acquire all necessary access (platforms, data, accounts)
  • Perform audits across all platforms
  • Define campaign structures
  • Develop creatives and copy
  • Execute and launch campaigns
Phase 2: Optimize

• Run ongoing audits and analytics
  • Refine media planning and strategy
  • Monitor daily performance and fine-tune
  • Conduct bi-weekly client calls
  • Reallocate or pause underperformers
Phase 3: Scale

• Identify top-performing campaigns
  • Develop a roadmap and scaling plan
  • Scale vertically (increase budget) and horizontally (expand reach)
  • Deploy advanced reporting systems
  • Execute the scaling roadmap strategically

a:3:{i:0;a:5:{s:15:"seo-story-title";s:36:"Why Choose Our SEO Company in India?";s:14:"seo-story-data";s:557:"

Selecting the right SEO partner is critical. We bring together:

  • Proven expertise in managing SEO campaigns across industries.
  • ROI-focused approach that prioritizes qualified leads over vanity traffic.
  • Transparent reporting so you know exactly what’s working.
  • Custom strategies designed for startups, SMEs, and enterprises.

a:1:{i:0;a:3:{s:25:"performance-what-is-title";s:30:"What Is Performance Marketing?";s:31:"performance-what-is-description";s:598:"

Performance marketing refers to digital marketing strategies and campaigns that are driven by results—typically, measurable actions like leads, sales, app installs, etc. Every rupee spent is tied to a KPI. If we don’t deliver results, you don’t pay (or you don’t invest much beyond guaranteed minimums).

Key components include:

  • Tracking & Analytics
  • Optimisation (landing pages, funnels, UX)
  • Precise audience targeting
  • A/B testing & experimentation
  • ROI-focused budget allocation
";s:25:"performance-what-is-image";s:3:"951";}}
What Is Performance Marketing?

Performance marketing refers to digital marketing strategies and campaigns that are driven by results—typically, measurable actions like leads, sales, app installs, etc. Every rupee spent is tied to a KPI. If we don’t deliver results, you don’t pay (or you don’t invest much beyond guaranteed minimums).

Key components include:

  • Tracking & Analytics
  • Optimisation (landing pages, funnels, UX)
  • Precise audience targeting
  • A/B testing & experimentation
  • ROI-focused budget allocation

a:7:{i:0;a:2:{s:26:"performance-faq-list-title";s:101:"What is the difference between a performance marketing agency & traditional digital marketing agency?";s:28:"performance-faq-list-content";s:266:"

Traditional digital marketing often focuses on brand awareness, impressions, traffic, social following. Performance marketing specifically ties spend to measurable outcomes—leads, purchases, conversions. You pay for results, or optimize toward results.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:26:"performance-faq-list-title";s:31:"How long before I’ll see ROI?";s:28:"performance-faq-list-content";s:297:"

It depends on factors like your industry, competition, product-price point, budget, and how strong your current funnel / website / creatives are. Typically, initial testing & learning may take 2-4 weeks. Significant ROI usually seen in 8-12 weeks once optimisation cycles are in place.

";}i:2;a:2:{s:26:"performance-faq-list-title";s:35:"How much budget is needed to start?";s:28:"performance-faq-list-content";s:308:"

Minimum budgets depend on channel and competition. For local Mumbai campaigns, sometimes less budget is needed; for national/international scale or high-cost competitive verticals (e.g. finance, education), you’ll need higher spends. We work closely with you to map expected outcomes vs budget.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:26:"performance-faq-list-title";s:74:"Will you manage everything — creative, ad spend, optimisation, tracking?";s:28:"performance-faq-list-content";s:263:"

Yes. We typically offer end-to-end performance marketing services: from creative & copy, landing pages, audience targeting, media buying, optimization, to analytics & reporting. If you have in-house resources, we can also collaborate or fill gaps.

";}i:4;a:2:{s:26:"performance-faq-list-title";s:69:"What types of businesses do you serve & industries you specialize in?";s:28:"performance-faq-list-content";s:338:"

We’ve worked with e-commerce companies, local service businesses, SaaS, startups, apps, retail, education, hospitality among others. If your business needs lead generation agency, social media boost, or conversion rate optimization service, we have packages and experience tailored for you.

";}i:5;a:2:{s:26:"performance-faq-list-title";s:98:"Why choose a performance marketing agency in Mumbai / India instead of overseas or doing in-house?";s:28:"performance-faq-list-content";s:278:"

Local presence means better cultural relevance, language nuance, faster communication, better understanding of local consumer behavior. Also cost advantage. However, we combine this local insight with global best practices, data-driven tools, and cross-border learnings.

";}i:6;a:2:{s:26:"performance-faq-list-title";s:40:"How is performance tracked and reported?";s:28:"performance-faq-list-content";s:337:"

We set up dashboards (e.g. Google Analytics, Tag Manager, ad platform dashboards). We define KPIs in advance. Reports are usually weekly or bi-weekly. We share insights: what’s working, what isn’t, what we’re shifting. You’ll always know your cost per lead, cost per acquisition, revenue per ad spend etc.

";}}
What is the difference between a performance marketing agency & traditional digital marketing agency?

Traditional digital marketing often focuses on brand awareness, impressions, traffic, social following. Performance marketing specifically ties spend to measurable outcomes—leads, purchases, conversions. You pay for results, or optimize toward results.
How long before I’ll see ROI?

It depends on factors like your industry, competition, product-price point, budget, and how strong your current funnel / website / creatives are. Typically, initial testing & learning may take 2-4 weeks. Significant ROI usually seen in 8-12 weeks once optimisation cycles are in place.
How much budget is needed to start?

Minimum budgets depend on channel and competition. For local Mumbai campaigns, sometimes less budget is needed; for national/international scale or high-cost competitive verticals (e.g. finance, education), you’ll need higher spends. We work closely with you to map expected outcomes vs budget.
Will you manage everything — creative, ad spend, optimisation, tracking?

Yes. We typically offer end-to-end performance marketing services: from creative & copy, landing pages, audience targeting, media buying, optimization, to analytics & reporting. If you have in-house resources, we can also collaborate or fill gaps.
What types of businesses do you serve & industries you specialize in?

We’ve worked with e-commerce companies, local service businesses, SaaS, startups, apps, retail, education, hospitality among others. If your business needs lead generation agency, social media boost, or conversion rate optimization service, we have packages and experience tailored for you.
Why choose a performance marketing agency in Mumbai / India instead of overseas or doing in-house?

Local presence means better cultural relevance, language nuance, faster communication, better understanding of local consumer behavior. Also cost advantage. However, we combine this local insight with global best practices, data-driven tools, and cross-border learnings.
How is performance tracked and reported?

We set up dashboards (e.g. Google Analytics, Tag Manager, ad platform dashboards). We define KPIs in advance. Reports are usually weekly or bi-weekly. We share insights: what’s working, what isn’t, what we’re shifting. You’ll always know your cost per lead, cost per acquisition, revenue per ad spend etc.

Working with a paid social media agency ensures your campaigns are backed by strategy, creative design, and constant optimization. Instead of spending blindly, experts help you set goals, identify the right audience, and run the best social media ad campaigns that maximize ROI.

";}i:2;a:2:{s:32:"paid-social-media-faq-list-title";s:65:"How are paid social media campaigns different from organic posts?";s:34:"paid-social-media-faq-list-content";s:342:"

Organic posts build long-term engagement but often struggle with limited reach due to platform algorithms. Paid advertising social media campaigns, on the other hand, guarantee visibility by targeting users based on demographics, interests, and behaviors—delivering quicker and more scalable outcomes.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:32:"paid-social-media-faq-list-title";s:55:"Which platforms are best for social media ad campaigns?";s:34:"paid-social-media-faq-list-content";s:451:"

The choice depends on your goals and audience. For broad reach and consumer engagement, Facebook and Instagram Ads work best. For B2B lead generation, LinkedIn Ads are more effective. For storytelling and brand visibility, YouTube video ads are ideal. A strong social media digital marketing strategy often combines multiple platforms.

Budgets vary based on industry, goals, and competition. Some businesses start with as little as ₹20,000 per month, while others scale into lakhs for bigger results. The key is focusing on ROI—well-structured social media campaigns can often generate returns that far exceed the spend.

 

";}i:5;a:2:{s:32:"paid-social-media-faq-list-title";s:60:"How do you measure the success of social media ad campaigns?";s:34:"paid-social-media-faq-list-content";s:273:"

We track key metrics such as impressions, clicks, conversions, cost per lead (CPL), and return on ad spend (ROAS). Detailed reporting ensures you know exactly how your social ad campaigns are performing and where improvements can be made.

";}i:6;a:2:{s:32:"paid-social-media-faq-list-title";s:53:"What makes DigiVeritaz different from other agencies?";s:34:"paid-social-media-faq-list-content";s:302:"

Our focus is on creating the best social media ad campaigns that blend creativity with performance. From video-led ads to retargeting funnels, we combine innovation with data-driven insights, ensuring your brand gets results that matter—not just vanity metrics.

";}}
What is paid advertising on social media?

Paid advertising on social media refers to running social ad campaigns on platforms like Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube to reach a specific audience. Unlike organic posts, paid ads are targeted, measurable, and designed to deliver faster results such as leads, sales, or brand awareness.
Why should I choose a paid social media agency?

Working with a paid social media agency ensures your campaigns are backed by strategy, creative design, and constant optimization. Instead of spending blindly, experts help you set goals, identify the right audience, and run the best social media ad campaigns that maximize ROI.
How are paid social media campaigns different from organic posts?

Organic posts build long-term engagement but often struggle with limited reach due to platform algorithms. Paid advertising social media campaigns, on the other hand, guarantee visibility by targeting users based on demographics, interests, and behaviors—delivering quicker and more scalable outcomes.
Which platforms are best for social media ad campaigns?

The choice depends on your goals and audience. For broad reach and consumer engagement, Facebook and Instagram Ads work best. For B2B lead generation, LinkedIn Ads are more effective. For storytelling and brand visibility, YouTube video ads are ideal. A strong social media digital marketing strategy often combines multiple platforms.
How much should I budget for social media campaigns?

Budgets vary based on industry, goals, and competition. Some businesses start with as little as ₹20,000 per month, while others scale into lakhs for bigger results. The key is focusing on ROI—well-structured social media campaigns can often generate returns that far exceed the spend.
How do you measure the success of social media ad campaigns?

We track key metrics such as impressions, clicks, conversions, cost per lead (CPL), and return on ad spend (ROAS). Detailed reporting ensures you know exactly how your social ad campaigns are performing and where improvements can be made.
What makes DigiVeritaz different from other agencies?

Our focus is on creating the best social media ad campaigns that blend creativity with performance. From video-led ads to retargeting funnels, we combine innovation with data-driven insights, ensuring your brand gets results that matter—not just vanity metrics.
Platforms We Specialize In
Our expertise covers a wide range of platforms, allowing us to design the best social media ad campaigns tailored to each business.
No matter the platform, we ensure your message reaches the right audience in the most effective way.
Benefits of Working with a Paid Social Media Agency

Investing in paid advertising social media campaigns gives your brand an edge over competitors. Unlike organic marketing, these campaigns are targeted, measurable, and scalable. Partnering with the right paid social media agency ensures that your investment translates into real business growth.

Ongoing Support & Account Management

  • Store maintenance, updates, seasonal refreshes
  • Customer feedback, ratings / reviews management

White Label Approach
We build your store or marketplace presence under your brand. We don’t want to rebrand ourselves—this is your e-commerce platform, powered by us.
End-to-End Capabilities
From strategy & platform selection to analytics & customer care. You get a full stack service so there are no gaps—each piece feeds into the other.
Data-First, Performance-Driven
All our decisions are grounded in data. The ecommerce dashboard you get will help you see which products are driving profit, which ad campaigns are working, and what levers to pull for growth.
Scalability & Flexibility
Whether you are starting with 10 SKUs or have thousands; whether you sell on one marketplace or multiple platforms; whether you want seasonal bursts or stable year-round growth—we scale with you.
Compliance, Policies & Risk Mitigation
Marketplace rules, tax regimes, shipping policies, returns—these can trip you up. We ensure your operation stays compliant, reducing risk of penalties, takedowns, or trust issues.

Discovery & Audit
We begin by auditing your existing presence: webstore, marketplace accounts, ad spend, inventory, operational gaps. Then we map them to your business goals (growth, margin, reach).
Strategic Roadmap & White Label Platform Blueprint
Based on the audit, we propose a roadmap—platforms to use, product lines to prioritize, promotional calendar, tech stack, staffing or partner needs.
Implementation & Setup
We deploy the chosen platform(s), configure dashboards, set up ad accounts, integrate logistic partners, listing your products, training or onboarding staff as needed.
Launch & Go-Live Support
When you’re ready to sell, we make sure the store is optimised, promotions are live, customer experience is smooth. Monitoring starts in real time, ready to fix any issues (inventory, UX, orders).
Ongoing Management & Growth
This is the core: account management, ads & campaigns, regular performance review, continuous optimisation, expansion to new channels, scaling operations.

a:1:{i:0;a:3:{s:21:"e-commerce-what-title";s:38:"Ecommerce Dashboard: What You’ll Get";s:23:"e-commerce-what-content";s:652:"

A good dashboard is your control centre. We provide dashboards tailored to you, showing:

  • Sales by product / category / channel (marketplace vs webstore)
  • Conversion rates (product page, cart abandonment, etc.)
  • Ad performance: spend, impressions, clicks, ROAS, ACOS (if applicable)
  • Inventory status & turnover rates
  • Order fulfilment metrics: shipping time, return rate, customer complaints
  • Customer metrics: repeat purchase rate, average order value, lifetime value

You can get these reports weekly, monthly, or even real-time depending on your plan.

";s:21:"e-commerce-what-image";s:3:"959";}}
Ecommerce Dashboard: What You’ll Get

A good dashboard is your control centre. We provide dashboards tailored to you, showing:

  • Sales by product / category / channel (marketplace vs webstore)
  • Conversion rates (product page, cart abandonment, etc.)
  • Ad performance: spend, impressions, clicks, ROAS, ACOS (if applicable)
  • Inventory status & turnover rates
  • Order fulfilment metrics: shipping time, return rate, customer complaints
  • Customer metrics: repeat purchase rate, average order value, lifetime value

You can get these reports weekly, monthly, or even real-time depending on your plan.

What is included under an “ecommerce managed service”?

A: It generally includes end-to-end support: platform setup, product & inventory management, order fulfilment, returns / logistics coordination, ad campaign management, analytics & reporting, compliance, and ongoing optimization.
What does “white label e-commerce platform” mean?

A: It means a platform or storefront that is branded as your store—your logo, design, UI/UX, domain—while the backend operations, tech, maintenance etc. are handled by us. The customer interface is yours; the infrastructure & operations are ours.
How do you measure success? Which KPIs do you track?

A: Key metrics include conversion rate, average order value, repeat purchase rate, return rate, ad spend efficiency (ROAS / ACOS), inventory turnover, gross margin, customer lifetime value. The ecommerce dashboard gives visibility on all these.
Can you help with both marketplace platforms (Amazon, Flipkart etc.) and standalone webstores?

A: Absolutely. We manage both — making sure your presence on Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra etc. is optimised, and your own webstore (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento etc.) also performs well. The coordination between channels is critical for avoiding stock issues, mismatched branding, or conflicting promotions.
How quickly can you get started, and when will I see results?

A: Depending on the scope, we can begin work within 1-2 weeks of agreement. Platform setup, catalog setup may take a few weeks. Early returns (traffic, small sales) can appear quickly if ads are used; more sustainable performance (repeat customers, high margins) typically show in 3-6 months.
What kind of support do I need internally? What do you deliver vs what I deliver?

A: We provide the full backend service, but your internal team or leadership usually contributes around decisions on assortment, branding guidelines, approval in pricing/promos. You may also provide product content or product photography where needed, or we can help source them.
How do you handle compliance, returns & policy issues on marketplaces?

A: We closely monitor marketplace rules and policies (listings, content, claims). Return/exchange/refund processes are managed as per platform or your choice of logistics partners. We also help with dispute resolution, negative review management, product compliance (if applicable, e.g. safety certifications, hygiene etc.).
What does your ecommerce dashboard cost? Is it an extra charge?

A: Dashboard may be included in many plans. For customised dashboards or real-time integrations with external systems like ERP / warehouse, there may be additional fees—these will be included in the quote and depend on complexity.

Data Strategy & Consulting Services

In an environment overflowing with data, what truly matters is extracting real insight and using it to fuel growth, not just amassing numbers. At DigiVeritaz, our Data Strategy & Consulting service is designed exactly for that purpose. We partner with businesses to build strong data foundations, make sense of complex information, and transform insights into action.

a:4:{i:0;a:3:{s:27:"data-strategy-matters-title";s:34:"Aligning purpose with measurement:";s:29:"data-strategy-matters-content";s:198:"

Without a solid data strategy, metrics can become disconnected from business goals. Every KPI should trace back to a larger objective: growth, efficiency, customer satisfaction or retention.

";s:27:"data-strategy-matters-image";s:3:"961";}i:1;a:3:{s:27:"data-strategy-matters-title";s:30:"Consistency, accuracy & trust:";s:29:"data-strategy-matters-content";s:200:"

";s:27:"data-strategy-matters-image";s:3:"962";}i:2;a:3:{s:27:"data-strategy-matters-title";s:26:"Scalability & flexibility:";s:29:"data-strategy-matters-content";s:201:"

";s:27:"data-strategy-matters-image";s:3:"963";}i:3;a:3:{s:27:"data-strategy-matters-title";s:22:"Competitive advantage:";s:29:"data-strategy-matters-content";s:179:"

Aligning purpose with measurement:
Without a solid data strategy, metrics can become disconnected from business goals. Every KPI should trace back to a larger objective: growth, efficiency, customer satisfaction or retention.
Consistency, accuracy & trust:
As data comes from multiple sources — web analytics, CRM systems, social media, internal logs — we ensure consistency in definitions, clean data hygiene, and trustworthy reporting.
Scalability & flexibility:
Growing businesses need strategies that scale, accommodate new data pipelines, or change with market shifts. A well-crafted data strategy can evolve without collapsing under its own complexity.
Competitive advantage:
Companies that effectively employ their data get insights faster, predict trends, optimize operations, and respond to customers in more tailored ways.

We begin with a deep dive into your current systems, data pipelines, and reporting methods. This helps us uncover gaps, redundancies, and opportunities for quick wins. The outcome is a clear picture of what’s working and what needs attention.

Our consultants help you set up reliable data pipelines, integrate platforms like CRM and analytics tools, and build dashboards that visualize the metrics that matter most. We also ensure proper tracking, validation, and quality checks for accuracy.

";s:28:"data-strategy-services-image";s:3:"646";}i:3;a:3:{s:28:"data-strategy-services-title";s:20:"Analytics & Insights";s:34:"data-strategy-services-description";s:241:"

Beyond setup, we extract actionable insights. Our data analytics consultants use advanced statistical methods, segmentation, and predictive models to reveal customer behavior, market trends, and growth opportunities.

";s:28:"data-strategy-services-image";s:3:"638";}i:4;a:3:{s:28:"data-strategy-services-title";s:30:"Optimization & Ongoing Support";s:34:"data-strategy-services-description";s:273:"

Data isn’t a one-time project — it’s a continuous process. That’s why we provide business analytics consulting as ongoing support, fine-tuning dashboards, testing campaigns, and adjusting strategies as your business evolves.

";s:28:"data-strategy-services-image";s:3:"639";}}
Discovery & Audit

We begin with a deep dive into your current systems, data pipelines, and reporting methods. This helps us uncover gaps, redundancies, and opportunities for quick wins. The outcome is a clear picture of what’s working and what needs attention.
Strategy & Planning

Once we understand the landscape, our experts craft a data strategy that aligns with your business objectives. This includes defining KPIs, recommending the right tools, setting governance policies, and mapping out a phased roadmap for success.
Implementation & Systems

Our consultants help you set up reliable data pipelines, integrate platforms like CRM and analytics tools, and build dashboards that visualize the metrics that matter most. We also ensure proper tracking, validation, and quality checks for accuracy.
Analytics & Insights

Beyond setup, we extract actionable insights. Our data analytics consultants use advanced statistical methods, segmentation, and predictive models to reveal customer behavior, market trends, and growth opportunities.
Optimization & Ongoing Support

Data isn’t a one-time project — it’s a continuous process. That’s why we provide business analytics consulting as ongoing support, fine-tuning dashboards, testing campaigns, and adjusting strategies as your business evolves.

a:4:{i:0;a:5:{s:27:"data-strategy-section-title";s:50:"Our Data Analytics Consultants: What Sets Us Apart";s:29:"data-strategy-section-content";s:1173:"

When you engage with DigiVeritaz, you’re not just getting generic dashboards; you’re getting expert partners who bring together domain, technical, and communication expertise. Here’s what our data analytics consultants do differently:

  • Holistic view: We bridge marketing, operations, finance — ensuring insights aren’t siloed but contribute to the big picture.
  • Hands-on & practical: We don’t just deliver reports. We help execute tracking, build dashboards, interpret data, and support changes.
  • Tailored to you: Whether you’re a startup, SME or enterprise, we scale our approach. If you’re just beginning data strategy, we help you start clean; if you have mature systems, we help you fine-tune, optimize, and predict.
  • Clear communication: Complex data insights can’t help if they aren’t understood. We specialise in simplifying analytics, making sure every stakeholder — technical or non-technical — “gets it.”
";s:27:"data-strategy-section-image";s:3:"965";s:30:"data-strategy-section-position";s:4:"left";s:38:"data-strategy-section-background-class";s:0:"";}i:1;a:5:{s:27:"data-strategy-section-title";s:55:"Copywriting & Content Writing: Powering Data with Words";s:29:"data-strategy-section-content";s:1126:"

Data may show what is happening — but words tell the story that moves people. As part of our offering, we integrate copywriting and content writing:

  • Data-driven content creation: Using what the data tells us (high-volume searches, customer intents, pain points) to craft blog posts, guides, landing pages, ad-copy that resonate and convert.
  • Storytelling with insights: Translating analytics into narratives — e.g. “What time of day do users convert best?”, “Which features do customers praise most?” — to inform content topics.
  • Optimized for channels: Whether it’s SEO articles, email drip campaigns, or social content, our writing is shaped by performance data (what headlines drive opens, what formats get shares, etc.).
  • Alignment with brand voice & purpose: Data without identity loses impact. Our content maintains your brand’s tone, values, and voice — making your messages authentic, trustworthy, and memorable.
";s:27:"data-strategy-section-image";s:3:"966";s:30:"data-strategy-section-position";s:5:"right";s:38:"data-strategy-section-background-class";s:18:"case-use-scenarios";}i:2;a:5:{s:27:"data-strategy-section-title";s:60:"Business Analytics Consulting: Turning Numbers into Strategy";s:29:"data-strategy-section-content";s:1051:"

Under this umbrella, business analytics consulting is about building durable capacity inside your organisation to make data a driver of strategic decision-making.

  • Cross-functional usage: Marketing, sales, operations, finance — all benefit when analytics is embedded. We help set up KPIs, dashboards, reporting flows for each major function.
  • Forecasting and scenario planning: Not just “what happened” but “what if” — scenario modeling, predictive analytics, risk assessment. This helps you prepare for shifts, scale, or pivot when needed.
  • ROI-led evaluation: Every investment — campaigns, tools, people — is measured. We help you decide where to double down and where to reallocate.
  • Capacity building & training: Empowering your team with data literacy: reading dashboards, understanding metrics, asking the right questions.
";s:27:"data-strategy-section-image";s:3:"967";s:30:"data-strategy-section-position";s:4:"left";s:38:"data-strategy-section-background-class";s:0:"";}i:3;a:5:{s:27:"data-strategy-section-title";s:46:"Key Benefits of Our Data Strategy & Consulting";s:29:"data-strategy-section-content";s:605:"

By working with us, here’s what clients usually see:

  • Clearer visibility into what’s working — and what’s not — allowing faster course corrections.
  • Higher ROI from marketing spend, because we stop guessing and start measuring.
  • Better alignment across teams — everyone works off the same data, same definitions, same insights.
  • More engaging content and messaging, because content comes from real consumer insights.
  • Reduced risk: you make decisions based on data, not gut feelings.
";s:27:"data-strategy-section-image";s:3:"968";s:30:"data-strategy-section-position";s:5:"right";s:38:"data-strategy-section-background-class";s:18:"case-use-scenarios";}}
Our Data Analytics Consultants: What Sets Us Apart

When you engage with DigiVeritaz, you’re not just getting generic dashboards; you’re getting expert partners who bring together domain, technical, and communication expertise. Here’s what our data analytics consultants do differently:

  • Holistic view: We bridge marketing, operations, finance — ensuring insights aren’t siloed but contribute to the big picture.
  • Hands-on & practical: We don’t just deliver reports. We help execute tracking, build dashboards, interpret data, and support changes.
  • Tailored to you: Whether you’re a startup, SME or enterprise, we scale our approach. If you’re just beginning data strategy, we help you start clean; if you have mature systems, we help you fine-tune, optimize, and predict.
  • Clear communication: Complex data insights can’t help if they aren’t understood. We specialise in simplifying analytics, making sure every stakeholder — technical or non-technical — “gets it.”
left
Copywriting & Content Writing: Powering Data with Words

Data may show what is happening — but words tell the story that moves people. As part of our offering, we integrate copywriting and content writing:

  • Data-driven content creation: Using what the data tells us (high-volume searches, customer intents, pain points) to craft blog posts, guides, landing pages, ad-copy that resonate and convert.
  • Storytelling with insights: Translating analytics into narratives — e.g. “What time of day do users convert best?”, “Which features do customers praise most?” — to inform content topics.
  • Optimized for channels: Whether it’s SEO articles, email drip campaigns, or social content, our writing is shaped by performance data (what headlines drive opens, what formats get shares, etc.).
  • Alignment with brand voice & purpose: Data without identity loses impact. Our content maintains your brand’s tone, values, and voice — making your messages authentic, trustworthy, and memorable.
right
case-use-scenarios
Business Analytics Consulting: Turning Numbers into Strategy

Under this umbrella, business analytics consulting is about building durable capacity inside your organisation to make data a driver of strategic decision-making.

  • Cross-functional usage: Marketing, sales, operations, finance — all benefit when analytics is embedded. We help set up KPIs, dashboards, reporting flows for each major function.
  • Forecasting and scenario planning: Not just “what happened” but “what if” — scenario modeling, predictive analytics, risk assessment. This helps you prepare for shifts, scale, or pivot when needed.
  • ROI-led evaluation: Every investment — campaigns, tools, people — is measured. We help you decide where to double down and where to reallocate.
  • Capacity building & training: Empowering your team with data literacy: reading dashboards, understanding metrics, asking the right questions.
left
Key Benefits of Our Data Strategy & Consulting

By working with us, here’s what clients usually see:

  • Clearer visibility into what’s working — and what’s not — allowing faster course corrections.
  • Higher ROI from marketing spend, because we stop guessing and start measuring.
  • Better alignment across teams — everyone works off the same data, same definitions, same insights.
  • More engaging content and messaging, because content comes from real consumer insights.
  • Reduced risk: you make decisions based on data, not gut feelings.
right
case-use-scenarios

Discovery Call
Get to know your business, your challenges, your data sources, decision processes, who uses data, what pain points exist.
Audit of Current State
Review tools, dashboards, tracking setup, existing reports, data sources, content performance.
Strategy Workshop
Define goals, metrics, roadmap, responsibilities, data pipelines, any new tools required.
Implementation Phase
Set up tracking, dashboards, data flows; integrate platforms; begin content based on early insights.
Insight & Analytics Phase
Regular reporting, trend analysis, content performance reviews; meetings to interpret data, propose actions.
Optimization & Scaling
As you see results, iterate. Introduce more complex analytics, predictive models; scale content & campaigns those that perform best.
Training & Transition
We can train internal stakeholders so that analysis, content & strategy continue even after our engagement ends.

a:1:{i:0;a:3:{s:23:"data-strategy-who-title";s:28:"Who Should Use This Service?";s:25:"data-strategy-who-content";s:587:"

How long does a full strategy implementation take?

• For SMEs, a complete audit, roadmap, and initial setup usually takes 6–10 weeks.
  • For large enterprises with multiple departments and complex systems, it can extend to a few months.
What tools do you use?

• Google Analytics (GA4), Looker Studio, Power BI, Tableau for reporting and visualization.
  • CRM integrations (HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho) and advertising platforms for performance tracking.
  • ETL and data pipeline tools for automation and real-time updates.
Do you also provide content writing (blogs, landing pages, ads)?

• Yes — we integrate copywriting and content writing into our service.
  • Content is shaped by data insights (topics, keywords, customer intent) to maximize ROI.
Is this just for big companies?

• No — our business analytics consulting is scalable.
  • Startups and SMEs get lean, cost-effective frameworks.
  • Enterprises benefit from advanced data governance, predictive modeling, and scalable dashboards.
Can you train our internal teams?

• Yes — we provide workshops and hands-on training on data literacy, dashboard reading, and content strategy.
  • The goal is to make your teams independent and confident with data usage.
What ROI can we expect?

• Stronger alignment of marketing spend with conversions.
  • Increased efficiency in decision-making.
  • Reduced wastage by cutting underperforming campaigns and doubling down on proven ones.

Discovery & Audit
We begin by understanding your business, goals, cash flow, competition and existing digital footprint. We audit current PPC campaigns (if any), website & landing pages, and conversion paths.
Keyword & Market Research
Using tools and human insight, we find profitable, relevant keywords (including long tail), understand search trends, volume, region, competition, seasonality.
Strategy & Campaign Architecture
Define the structure: campaigns per objective (brand awareness, sales, lead gen), ad groups per theme, match-types, targeting.
Ad Copy + Creative + Extensions
Craft compelling ad copy that aligns with user intent. Use ad extensions (sitelinks, callouts, call extensions etc.). Design display/visual creatives or video.
Tracking & Infrastructure Setup
Ensure proper setup: conversion tracking (form fills, calls, purchases), Analytics / GA4, tagging, audience lists, remarketing setup.
Launch & Monitor
Launch campaigns with initial bids, budgets. Monitor impressions, clicks, spend, early conversions. Adjust for budget pacing.
Optimisation & Scaling

• Refine negative keywords, pause underperforming ad groups.
  • Test multiple ad copies / creatives.
  • Adjust bids by time / device / geography.
  • Use bid-strategies for CPA / target ROAS when enough data is present.
  • Scale up budgets where ROI is positive.
Reporting & Insights
Deliver regular reports (weekly / monthly) showing: spend, CPC, CPA, conversion rate, ROAS, insights, recommendations. Use dashboards for transparency

a:3:{i:0;a:5:{s:27:"pay-per-click-section-title";s:41:"Types of Ads & Platforms We Specialize In";s:29:"pay-per-click-section-content";s:814:"
  • Search Ads (Google Search, Bing) – Reach users who are actively searching for your product or service.
  • Display Ads – Visual banners across Google Display Network & partner websites. Great for awareness & remarketing.
  • Shopping Ads – For e-commerce: show product image, price directly in search engine results.
  • Video Ads – YouTube and other video placements to tell brand stories or product demos.
  • Remarketing & Retargeting – Re-engage users who visited but did not convert.
  • App Install Ads – If you have an app, we run campaigns to acquire users cost-effectively.

  • Ad Relevance & UX: Ad copy → landing page alignment + faster page speed + mobile optimization.

  • Budget Efficiency: Shift budgets from low ROI campaigns to high performing ones. Regular waste (irrelevant clicks, poor keywords) minimised via negative keyword lists.

What is PPC campaign management, and why do I need it?

PPC campaign management refers to the end-to-end process of planning, launching, monitoring, optimizing, and scaling paid campaigns (especially on Google Ads, Bing, Display/Video). Without expert management, your ad spend might be wasted on irrelevant clicks, poor creatives, or wrong targeting. As your PPC experts, we structure campaigns for efficient performance, track metrics, and adjust strategies to ensure real business results.
How soon will I see results from a PPC campaign?

You’ll see initial results (impressions, clicks) almost immediately after launch. However, meaningful outcomes like stable conversions, lower CPA, good ROAS usually take 2-4 weeks of data gathering and optimization. For some verticals, more time may be needed to test creatives, keywords, etc.
What makes a good Google Ads Expert Near Me / Google Ads Agency in Mumbai?

Here are features to look for:

  • Google certification(s) / partner status
  • Case studies relevant to your industry & location
  • Transparent reporting & clear metrics (CPC, CPA, ROAS)
  • Experience in ppc campaign optimization
  • Good communication, ability to adjust quickly
How do you determine budget and bidding strategy?

We assess your business goals (leads, sales, brand awareness), industry competition, keyword costs, conversion rate expectations, and profit margins. From there, we recommend a realistic monthly budget. For bidding, depending on data & campaign maturity, we may use manual, enhanced cost-per-click, target CPA or target ROAS bidding.
Which keywords do I pay for, and which ones should I avoid?

• Pay for: Keywords aligned with intent (for example, “buy shoes online”, “best accounting software” etc.), long tail keywords, local keywords if relevant, branded vs. non-branded.
  • Avoid or negative list: Irrelevant match types (broad where it doesn’t help), generic queries with low conversion intent (“download free”, “info about”) if they eat budget, competitor brand names if not beneficial.
Are there any common PPC mistakes to watch out for?

• Not using negative keywords
  • Allowing ad fatigue (keeping same ads too long)
  • Poor landing page experience (slow load, irrelevant content)
  • Not aligning ad copy with the landing page message
  • Overbidding without monitoring return
  • Failing to track conversions properly
How do you measure success of a PPC campaign?

We focus on metrics such as:

  • Cost Per Click (CPC)
  • Click-Through Rate (CTR)
  • Cost Per Acquisition (CPA)
  • Conversion Rate (CVR)
  • Return On Ad Spend (ROAS)
  • Quality Score
  • Impression Share

We use dashboards & regular reports so you can see transparency in results and understand what's working, what's not.
Is PPC expensive? How much should I expect to invest?

PPC isn’t “cheap” but when done right, it pays off. Costs vary by industry, keyword competitiveness, geography, and your goals. Small businesses may start with modest budgets (₹30,000-₹60,000/month), while larger brands investing in multiple channels may spend significantly more. What matters is ROI. A well-managed campaign often pays for itself many times over.
Can small/local businesses benefit from PPC, or is it only for big brands?

Absolutely. Local businesses can see excellent results when targeting “near me” keywords, geo-targeted ads, mobile audiences, etc. Being a google ads near me or google ads agency in mumbai means we understand these local levers.
Do you offer ongoing optimization or just initial setup?

We believe in continuous improvement. Our services aren’t limited to setup — ppc campaign optimization is built into every package: analysing performance, refining based on data, scaling what works, cutting what doesn’t.

Native Advertising Services by Digiveritaz
As a leading native advertising company in India, Digiveritaz combines platform expertise, creative finesse, and performance optimization to deliver native advertising services that move the needle.

a:1:{i:0;a:4:{s:34:"native-advertising-matters-heading";s:31:"Why Native Advertising Matters?";s:34:"native-advertising-matters-content";s:781:"

In today’s digital landscape, users are increasingly blind to traditional display ads. Banner fatigue, ad blockers, and general resistance to intrusive messaging mean brands must evolve. That’s where native advertising steps in — content that fits in, not sticks out. At Digiveritaz, we partner with you as a native ads agency to deliver seamless, high-impact campaigns that blend with user experience — driving both brand trust and measurable performance.

Native advertising is not just another ad format — it’s a full native advertising strategy that prioritizes relevance, engagement, and user experience. Here are some of the key advantages:

";s:39:"native-advertising-matters-full-content";s:1696:"
  • Seamless integration: Native ads mimic the look and feel of the platform or content context, reducing “ad interruption” and increasing receptivity.
  • Higher engagement & CTR: Because they feel like content rather than a blatant ad, native ads often achieve better click-through rates and dwell times compared to traditional display.
  • Better brand perception & trust: When done well, native ads deliver value (information, story, insight) alongside promotion, making them less jarring and more credible.
  • Resilience to ad blocking: Many users employ ad blockers that block standard display ads — but properly implemented native ads are harder to intercept because they are part of content flows.
  • Strong scalability & ROI: With programmatic native advertising and performance optimization, the cost per result can be very efficient.

According to market forecasts, the global native advertising market is estimated at USD 105.88 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow to USD 346.88 billion by 2033. The education sector is among the fastest-growing verticals leveraging native formats.

In India especially, brands and publishers are turning to native ad campaigns on platforms such as Taboola, Inshorts, ShareChat, and premium news networks — all of which are part of Digiveritaz’s native ecosystem.

Launch Your Brand With Us

";s:32:"native-advertising-matters-image";s:3:"973";}}
Why Native Advertising Matters?

In today’s digital landscape, users are increasingly blind to traditional display ads. Banner fatigue, ad blockers, and general resistance to intrusive messaging mean brands must evolve. That’s where native advertising steps in — content that fits in, not sticks out. At Digiveritaz, we partner with you as a native ads agency to deliver seamless, high-impact campaigns that blend with user experience — driving both brand trust and measurable performance.

Native advertising is not just another ad format — it’s a full native advertising strategy that prioritizes relevance, engagement, and user experience. Here are some of the key advantages:

• Seamless integration: Native ads mimic the look and feel of the platform or content context, reducing “ad interruption” and increasing receptivity.
  • Higher engagement & CTR: Because they feel like content rather than a blatant ad, native ads often achieve better click-through rates and dwell times compared to traditional display.
  • Better brand perception & trust: When done well, native ads deliver value (information, story, insight) alongside promotion, making them less jarring and more credible.
  • Resilience to ad blocking: Many users employ ad blockers that block standard display ads — but properly implemented native ads are harder to intercept because they are part of content flows.
  • Strong scalability & ROI: With programmatic native advertising and performance optimization, the cost per result can be very efficient.

According to market forecasts, the global native advertising market is estimated at USD 105.88 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow to USD 346.88 billion by 2033. The education sector is among the fastest-growing verticals leveraging native formats.

In India especially, brands and publishers are turning to native ad campaigns on platforms such as Taboola, Inshorts, ShareChat, and premium news networks — all of which are part of Digiveritaz’s native ecosystem.

Launch Your Brand With Us

Research & Platform Mapping

We begin by understanding your brand, your audience, and the content ecosystems they inhabit. Which publishers, news sites, social networks, or content recommendation engines resonate best for your vertical? We map out where native works for your goals — awareness, lead generation, content promotion, or branding.
Creative & Content Design

True native ads don’t feel like ads. Our creative team crafts headlines, visuals, and content formats that mirror the platform aesthetics and feel — without sacrificing clarity or performance. We weave storytelling, value-driven content, and subtle calls to action into the native format.
Campaign Setup & Targeting

We launch your native ad campaigns using platforms like Taboola, Inshorts, ShareChat, and recommendation networks. We configure bidding, placements, audience segments, contextual targeting, geos, and device parameters to match your ideal audience.
Testing & Optimization

We A/B test headlines, visuals, creatives, content angles, and placements. Our performance team monitors click-throughs, engagement, dwell time, conversions, and attribution pathways — iterating continuously to improve ROI.
Analytics & Insights

More than surface metrics, we deliver deep insights: which content formats worked best, which audience segments over-indexed, time-on-content, and conversion path analysis. Our dashboard delivers transparency so you always know how your native advertising strategy is performing.
Scaling & Expansion

Once we identify winning levers, we scale campaigns across new publishers, expand creatives, and optimize budgets. Because our model is performance-first, we scale only where results justify investment.

Ethical & Compliance-driven
We follow disclosure norms (“Sponsored,” “Promoted”) and platform guidelines to maintain user trust and ad performance.

a:5:{i:0;a:2:{s:33:"native-advertising-faq-list-title";s:74:"What is the difference between native advertising and display advertising?";s:35:"native-advertising-faq-list-content";s:267:"

Native ads are designed to blend into the content environment — in look, feel, and function. Display ads (banners, side-rail, popups) are more obviously promotional and can feel intrusive. Native focuses on seamless integration and contextual relevance.

";}i:1;a:2:{s:33:"native-advertising-faq-list-title";s:58:"Are native ads expensive for small businesses or startups?";s:35:"native-advertising-faq-list-content";s:241:"

Not necessarily. Native ad campaigns can be run with modest budgets if strategically executed, tested, and optimized. Many publishers allow flexible campaign sizes. The key is careful targeting, creative testing, and gradual scaling.

";}i:2;a:2:{s:33:"native-advertising-faq-list-title";s:30:"How long before I see results?";s:35:"native-advertising-faq-list-content";s:204:"

Performance can vary: initial engagement and click metrics may show within days, but more meaningful conversions or content-driven outcomes often take 2–4 weeks (or more) after optimization.

";}i:3;a:2:{s:33:"native-advertising-faq-list-title";s:58:"How do you ensure native ads comply with guidelines/trust?";s:35:"native-advertising-faq-list-content";s:200:"

We follow disclosure norms (e.g. “Sponsored,” “Promoted”), platform policies, and best practices. Our creative team ensures clarity without undermining the native feel.

";}i:4;a:2:{s:33:"native-advertising-faq-list-title";s:58:"Can native advertising be tracked and attributed properly?";s:35:"native-advertising-faq-list-content";s:193:"

Yes. We set up proper tracking via UTM parameters, pixel integrations, and conversion modeling to attribute leads, conversions, time-on-content, and assisted paths.

";}}
What is the difference between native advertising and display advertising?

Native ads are designed to blend into the content environment — in look, feel, and function. Display ads (banners, side-rail, popups) are more obviously promotional and can feel intrusive. Native focuses on seamless integration and contextual relevance.
Are native ads expensive for small businesses or startups?

Not necessarily. Native ad campaigns can be run with modest budgets if strategically executed, tested, and optimized. Many publishers allow flexible campaign sizes. The key is careful targeting, creative testing, and gradual scaling.
How long before I see results?
Performance can vary: initial engagement and click metrics may show within days, but more meaningful conversions or content-driven outcomes often take 2–4 weeks (or more) after optimization.
How do you ensure native ads comply with guidelines/trust?
We follow disclosure norms (e.g. “Sponsored,” “Promoted”), platform policies, and best practices. Our creative team ensures clarity without undermining the native feel.
Can native advertising be tracked and attributed properly?
Yes. We set up proper tracking via UTM parameters, pixel integrations, and conversion modeling to attribute leads, conversions, time-on-content, and assisted paths.

Organic Marketing Services

Drive Sustainable Growth Without Paid Ads

At DigiVeritaz, our organic marketing services help your brand grow naturally — without depending solely on paid ads. We use SEO, content marketing, social media optimization, and data-driven strategies to build long-term visibility, trust, and traffic that converts.

Whether you’re a startup, small business, or enterprise, our organic marketing agency in India focuses on one goal — helping your brand attract the right audience consistently.

a:1:{i:0;a:3:{s:31:"organic-marketing-what-is-title";s:26:"What Is Organic Marketing?";s:33:"organic-marketing-what-is-content";s:535:"

Organic marketing is the art of growing your business using non-paid, strategic channels such as search engines, social media, blogs, and community engagement.

Unlike paid ads that disappear when the budget stops, organic marketing builds lasting visibility. It involves optimizing your online presence, creating valuable content, and engaging authentically with your audience to gain trust, awareness, and loyalty.

In short: paid marketing brings traffic; organic marketing builds relationships that last.

";s:31:"organic-marketing-what-is-image";s:3:"931";}}

Organic marketing is the art of growing your business using non-paid, strategic channels such as search engines, social media, blogs, and community engagement.

Unlike paid ads that disappear when the budget stops, organic marketing builds lasting visibility. It involves optimizing your online presence, creating valuable content, and engaging authentically with your audience to gain trust, awareness, and loyalty.

In short: paid marketing brings traffic; organic marketing builds relationships that last.

Brand Strategy Development

Every strong brand begins with a strong strategy.

We define your mission, values, target audience, and market positioning to create a brand that resonates. Our branding experts analyze competitors and craft a brand strategy and design plan that gives you a clear edge.
Logo Design & Brand Identity

Your logo is your first impression, we make it unforgettable.

Our logo design services combine creativity with brand psychology to deliver professional, scalable, and timeless logos that communicate trust. Along with the logo, we create a complete brand identity design system, typography, color palette, imagery, and tone of voice.
Rebranding Services

Brands evolve, and we help them evolve with purpose.

Whether your brand needs a refresh or a total transformation, our rebranding services reposition your business for modern audiences while retaining the brand equity you’ve already built.
Visual & Corporate Identity Design

For corporate clients, we create corporate branding and design systems that project professionalism, stability, and authority. From business cards and stationery to presentation templates and office branding, our team ensures your brand’s look stays cohesive and premium.
Packaging & Marketing Collateral

We design packaging and marketing materials that turn heads and drive sales.

Our creative branding services include brochure design, social media creatives, email templates, signage, and digital assets, everything your brand needs to look world-class across all platforms.

a:1:{i:0;a:3:{s:18:"geo-banner-heading";s:36:"Generative Search Optimisation (GEO)";s:22:"geo-banner-heading-two";s:0:"";s:18:"geo-banner-content";s:348:"

The search landscape is changing fast. Traditional SEO was built around ranking for keywords — but today, users get their answers from AI-powered platforms like Google SGE, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Bing Copilot. These platforms don’t just list websites — they generate answers.

";}}
Generative Search Optimisation (GEO)

The search landscape is changing fast. Traditional SEO was built around ranking for keywords — but today, users get their answers from AI-powered platforms like Google SGE, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Bing Copilot. These platforms don’t just list websites — they generate answers.

a:2:{i:0;a:5:{s:17:"geo-section-title";s:39:"What is Generative Search Optimisation?";s:19:"geo-section-content";s:529:"

Generative Search Optimisation is the process of optimizing your website, brand content, and data to make them visible and reliable in AI-driven search environments.

It aligns your digital presence with how large language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and others interpret and summarize information.

Through GEO, your brand becomes part of the new “answer layer” — where users don’t just click; they trust.

";s:17:"geo-section-image";s:4:"1004";s:28:"geo-section-background-class";s:0:"";s:20:"geo-section-position";s:4:"left";}i:1;a:5:{s:17:"geo-section-title";s:38:"Why GEO is Critical for Modern Brands?";s:19:"geo-section-content";s:766:"
  • Traditional SEO is no longer enough: Google’s Search Generative Experience (SGE) now provides summarized answers directly in SERPs, reducing clicks to websites.
  • AI assistants are the new search engines: From Siri to Alexa to ChatGPT, people are getting answers conversationally.
  • Authority decides visibility: Generative AI references content it perceives as credible, structured, and context-rich.

By implementing GEO, you ensure your brand appears where conversations and decisions are actually happening — inside AI-driven results.

Launch Your Brand With Us

";s:17:"geo-section-image";s:3:"831";s:28:"geo-section-background-class";s:14:"seo-consultant";s:20:"geo-section-position";s:5:"right";}}
What is Generative Search Optimisation?

Generative Search Optimisation is the process of optimizing your website, brand content, and data to make them visible and reliable in AI-driven search environments.

It aligns your digital presence with how large language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and others interpret and summarize information.

Through GEO, your brand becomes part of the new “answer layer” — where users don’t just click; they trust.
left
Why GEO is Critical for Modern Brands?

• Traditional SEO is no longer enough: Google’s Search Generative Experience (SGE) now provides summarized answers directly in SERPs, reducing clicks to websites.
  • AI assistants are the new search engines: From Siri to Alexa to ChatGPT, people are getting answers conversationally.
  • Authority decides visibility: Generative AI references content it perceives as credible, structured, and context-rich.

By implementing GEO, you ensure your brand appears where conversations and decisions are actually happening — inside AI-driven results.

Launch Your Brand With Us
seo-consultant
right

a:5:{i:0;a:3:{s:19:"geo-framework-title";s:16:"Research & Audit";s:25:"geo-framework-description";s:288:"

We start with a Generative Visibility Audit, identifying:

  • Which of your topics appear in AI summaries.
  • What competitors are being cited in ChatGPT, SGE, or Perplexity.
  • Gaps where your brand could appear but doesn’t.
";s:19:"geo-framework-image";s:3:"657";}i:1;a:3:{s:19:"geo-framework-title";s:28:"AI-Ready Content Structuring";s:25:"geo-framework-description";s:341:"

We rewrite and optimize your content to:

  • Follow semantic hierarchy (H1-H4, FAQs, schemas).
  • Deliver concise, citation-friendly answers.
  • Integrate entities and context mapping to make it easier for LLMs to “understand” your brand.
";s:19:"geo-framework-image";s:3:"700";}i:2;a:3:{s:19:"geo-framework-title";s:28:"Technical GEO Implementation";s:25:"geo-framework-description";s:426:"

We apply backend enhancements such as:

  • Schema markup (Organization, FAQ, Product, HowTo, Review, LocalBusiness, etc.)
  • Knowledge graph linking and internal entity mapping.
  • Snippet & answer targeting or Google SGE and AI summaries.
  • Metadata optimization for both human and machine interpretation.
";s:19:"geo-framework-image";s:3:"590";}i:3;a:3:{s:19:"geo-framework-title";s:27:"Generative Content Strategy";s:25:"geo-framework-description";s:359:"

We create content specifically designed to appear in:

  • AI-generated search summaries
  • Conversational chatbots (ChatGPT, Bing Copilot)
  • Voice assistant responses (Google Assistant, Alexa, Siri)
  • Research tools like Perplexity and Claude
";s:19:"geo-framework-image";s:3:"634";}i:4;a:3:{s:19:"geo-framework-title";s:33:"Monitoring, Analysis & Adaptation";s:25:"geo-framework-description";s:293:"

We continuously monitor:

  • How often your content appears in SGE or AI tools
  • Which URLs are cited by AI
  • What kind of queries generate AI answers featuring your brand
  • Performance through our Generative Traffic Dashboard
";s:19:"geo-framework-image";s:3:"771";}}
Research & Audit

We start with a Generative Visibility Audit, identifying:

  • Which of your topics appear in AI summaries.
  • What competitors are being cited in ChatGPT, SGE, or Perplexity.
  • Gaps where your brand could appear but doesn’t.
AI-Ready Content Structuring

We rewrite and optimize your content to:

  • Follow semantic hierarchy (H1-H4, FAQs, schemas).
  • Deliver concise, citation-friendly answers.
  • Integrate entities and context mapping to make it easier for LLMs to “understand” your brand.
Technical GEO Implementation

We apply backend enhancements such as:

  • Schema markup (Organization, FAQ, Product, HowTo, Review, LocalBusiness, etc.)
  • Knowledge graph linking and internal entity mapping.
  • Snippet & answer targeting or Google SGE and AI summaries.
  • Metadata optimization for both human and machine interpretation.
Generative Content Strategy

We create content specifically designed to appear in:

  • AI-generated search summaries
  • Conversational chatbots (ChatGPT, Bing Copilot)
  • Voice assistant responses (Google Assistant, Alexa, Siri)
  • Research tools like Perplexity and Claude
Monitoring, Analysis & Adaptation

We continuously monitor:

  • How often your content appears in SGE or AI tools
  • Which URLs are cited by AI
  • What kind of queries generate AI answers featuring your brand
  • Performance through our Generative Traffic Dashboard

Real-World Benefits of GEO

• Appear in AI Answers: Increase visibility in tools like ChatGPT, Bing Copilot, and Google SGE.
  • Enhance Brand Authority: Build trust by being cited as a credible source.
  • Future-Proof Your SEO: Stay relevant as AI changes how people search.
  • Increase Organic Conversions: Drive highly-qualified traffic from users seeking verified answers.
  • Boost Knowledge Graph Presence: Make your brand part of structured web intelligence.
right
Why Choose DigiVeritaz for GEO?

• AI-Trained SEO Experts: Our team specializes in optimizing for both human readers and machine interpreters.
  • Technical + Creative Approach: We combine structured data and storytelling for superior AI comprehension.
  • Proactive Model Monitoring: We track updates from Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Meta to keep your strategy adaptive.
  • Full Integration with SEO Stack: GEO is not separate — it’s embedded across your technical SEO, content, and analytics.

Launch Your Brand With Us
seo-consultant
left
Who Needs Generative Search Optimisation?

GEO is essential if you are:

  • A brand competing in saturated markets and want early presence in AI search results.
  • A B2B or SaaS company looking for thought leadership recognition in AI summaries.
  • An e-commerce brand aiming to be mentioned in “top product” AI responses.
  • A local business targeting Google’s SGE and voice assistant recommendations.
right
Future of GEO — The AI Answer Economy

Generative search is building a new digital ecosystem where answers, not ads, dominate attention.

By investing in GEO today, you’re positioning your business to thrive in the AI-powered web of tomorrow — where your expertise becomes part of the world’s most advanced information engines.

At DigiVeritaz, we help brands move from search visibility to AI visibility.

Let’s make sure your brand isn’t just indexed — it’s interpreted, quoted, and trusted by the next generation of search engines.

📞 Get in touch today to start your Generative Search Optimisation journey.

Get In Touch
seo-consultant
left
Our GEO Framework at DigiVeritaz
At DigiVeritaz, we integrate GEO seamlessly into your existing SEO and content strategy. Our process covers every layer of AI visibility:
Then, we adapt your content dynamically to align with the latest AI model updates and search algorithms.
